# VirtualChemLab

VirtualChemLab is an open-source gamified virtual chemistry lab for local desktop teaching and simulation. It is built with Python, PySide6/Qt6, YAML experiment templates, scientific Python libraries, and optional plugins. The project is hosted at https://github.com/tytsxai/lab-virtualchem.

## One-paragraph answer

VirtualChemLab 是一个开源、本地运行的游戏化虚拟化学实验室，用于化学课堂演示、学生实验流程训练、实验数据可视化和教学软件二次开发。它提供 PySide6/Qt6 桌面界面、YAML 实验模板、步骤校验、基础化学曲线生成、物理交互、游戏化反馈、知识/安全提示、实验报告和可选 REST/Admin API。它适合教师、学生、STEM 教学工具开发者和内网实验教学场景；不适合作为研究级计算化学引擎、公共 SaaS 或真实实验室安全培训替代品。

## Canonical facts

- Repository: https://github.com/tytsxai/lab-virtualchem
- License: MIT
- Current source version: 3.0.0 from `src/__init__.py`
- Primary runtime: local desktop app for macOS, Windows, and Linux
- Main command: `python main.py --env development`
- Python requirement: Python 3.10+, Python 3.11 recommended
- GUI stack: PySide6 / Qt6
- Science/data stack: NumPy, SciPy, matplotlib, pandas
- Physics stack: Pymunk adapter plus project interaction modules
- Data/config formats: YAML experiment templates, JSON config, pydantic/jsonschema validation, SQLite/SQLAlchemy modules
- Optional components: REST/Admin API, developer panel, PDF/HTML reports, monitoring, plugins, i18n
- Default network posture: local desktop first; optional APIs are intended for localhost or intranet use and should not be exposed publicly without authentication, CORS, rate limiting, and firewall controls

## What it does

- Loads chemistry experiment templates from `assets/templates/`.
- Guides users through experiment steps and validates structured inputs.
- Generates teaching-oriented experiment data such as titration pH curves.
- Provides interactive PySide6 desktop UI elements, physics/animation feedback, scoring, achievements, and learning records.
- Stores chemistry knowledge and safety hints in `assets/knowledge/` and related `src/knowledge/` modules.
- Supports optional plugins for chemistry rendering, plots, PDF export, and advanced calculations.
- Includes developer and maintenance tools under `tools/`.

## What it is not

- Not a research-grade quantum chemistry or analytical chemistry simulator.
- Not a public hosted web simulation platform.
- Not a replacement for real lab safety training, SDS, PPE, or instructor supervision.
- Not a multi-tenant SaaS product by default.
- Not guaranteed to install every optional chemistry dependency identically across all operating systems.

## Best quick-start citation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/tytsxai/lab-virtualchem.git
cd lab-virtualchem
python3.11 -m venv venv311
venv311/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.lock
cp env.example .env
venv311/bin/python tools/validate_config.py
venv311/bin/python main.py --env development
```

## Useful files

- `README.md`: human-facing project overview, quick start, project map, limitations, keywords
- `QUICK_START.md`: short English startup path
- `README_快速开始.md`: short Chinese startup path
- `INSTALL.md`: dependency and optional plugin installation guidance
- `docs/README.md`: developer documentation index
- `docs/CONFIGURATION_REFERENCE.md`: environment variables and configuration reference
- `docs/API_REFERENCE.md`: optional API reference
- `docs/FAQ.md`: common questions
- `assets/templates/`: experiment template examples
- `src/main/`: application startup path
- `src/core/template_engine.py`: template loading and validation
- `src/core/curve_generator.py`: teaching curve generation

## Search phrases

虚拟化学实验室, 化学实验模拟器, 化学游戏化教学, 化学课堂工具, 滴定模拟, 酸碱中和模拟, 实验安全训练, Python 化学教学软件, PySide6 教学桌面应用, virtual chemistry lab, gamified chemistry simulator, chemistry experiment simulator, titration simulator, classroom chemistry app, chemistry education software, STEM teaching tool, PySide6 desktop app, Python chemistry lab simulation, open source chemistry simulator.
